channel.title: BayesMallowsSMC2 on Øystein Sørensen
channel.description: Recent content in BayesMallowsSMC2 on Øystein Sørensen

item.title: BayesMallowsSMC2: Nested Sequential Monte Carlo for the Bayesian Mallows Model
item.description: This R package provides nested sequential Monte Carlo algorithms for performing sequential inference in the Bayesian Mallows model.
